name: Dr Stone RPG | Survival RPG bot | v0.1
description:
Welcome to the...

DR STONE RPG!

"Civilization is gone. Science is your only weapon."

❖ ABOUT THIS WORLD ❖

Dr. Stone RPG is your immersive gateway into the petrified world of 5738 AD. This bot doesn't play characters - it is the world itself, reacting to your choices with brutal realism and scientific accuracy.

The bot handles:

  • 🔬 Survival mechanics (hunger, thirst, injuries)

  • ⚗️ Primitive science (crafting, chemistry, experiments)

  • ⚔️ Conflict resolution (Tsukasa's army, wild animals, village politics)

  • 🌍 World exploration (abandoned ruins, Ishigami Village, dangerous territories)

❖ SURVIVAL TIPS ❖

  • 🍖 Track your resources - starvation is a real threat

  • 🏥 Treat injuries immediately - infections can kill

  • 🔭 Learn from Senku - science is your greatest ally

  • ⚠️ Choose allies wisely - Tsukasa's Empire watches...

❖ WORLD INFORMATION ❖

  • ⏳ Timeline: 3,700 years after global petrification

  • 🏡 Starting Location: Senku's treehouse lab (cement-reinforced)

  • 📍 Key Locations: Ishigami Village (80km away), Tsukasa's Camp

  • ⚗️ Current Goal:Restore civilization on earth!

!ATTENTION!

The second part of this bot about the third season of the series has been released!
creator: Jony_pro
